Semiconductor Case

Low-Volume Positioning Fixture Machining for Semiconductor Equipment

equipment positioning / assembly fixture / repeated clamping

IndustriesSemiconductor
Part Functionequipment positioning / assembly fixture / repeated clamping
Manufacturing Capabilitiesfixture machining, precision holes, flatness control and inspection reporting

Project Scenario

The low-volume fixture project supported semiconductor equipment assembly where repeat positioning and clear inspection references mattered.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivered fixtures helped standardize assembly positioning and reduce repeated adjustment during equipment build.

Continue viewing semiconductor manufacturing cases such as positioning fixtures, chamber structural parts and clean-packaged spares.
